CREATE TABLE geo_polygon (pg Polygon) ENGINE = Memory();
CREATE TABLE geo_data (id UInt32, polygon_data Polygon) ENGINE = Memory();
SELECT id, polygon_data, toTypeName(polygon_data) FROM geo_data WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM geo_data WHERE id > 0);
SELECT pg, toTypeName(pg) FROM geo_polygon WHERE pg[1] IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM geo_polygon WHERE length(pg) > 1;
WITH (SELECT [[(0,0), (10,0), (10,10), (0,10)], []]) AS new_polygon SELECT new_polygon, toTypeName(new_polygon);
